name: sprintra
description: Persistent project memory for Claude Code with Memory Layer Phase 6 (continuous capture) — opt-in via phase6_enabled flag. Local SQLite buffer survives Wi-Fi flaps + crashes; redacts secrets before disk write; auto-attaches unmarked repos; recovers crashed sessions from local transcripts. Plus all v1.3 features: SessionStart briefing, UserPromptSubmit + PostToolUse capture, Stop digest, SessionEnd cleanup, 6 PM workflow skills.
